problem_solved: Healthcare providers lack integrated digital tools for patient triage, video consultations, and remote care delivery. Visiba Care provides a white-label SaaS platform that enables clinics and hospitals to offer digital care pathways and virtual consultations.
who_buys: Clinics, hospitals, healthcare systems, and private care providers across Sweden, Norway, Finland, and the UK
key_features: Digital triage and symptom assessment for routing patients to appropriate care
Integrated video consultation platform with secure messaging
Customizable digital care pathways for various specialties including mental health
why_varden_care: Platform-agnostic digital care infrastructure that can be replicated in other markets. Strong traction in Nordic countries with proven ability to sell to healthcare systems. Mental health is one of their key specialty areas.

problem_solved: Long wait times and limited access to psychological care in Sweden. Mindler provides rapid access to licensed psychologists through video consultations, with both consumer-facing and employer-B2B offerings.
who_buys: Employers (B2B wellness programs), insurance companies, and individual consumers (DTC)
key_features: Video consultations with licensed psychologists within 24-48 hours
Digital CBT (cognitive behavioral therapy) programs for common conditions
Employer dashboard for tracking utilization and outcomes
business_model: Hybrid (DTC per-session pricing + B2B employer subscriptions)
why_varden_care: Proven model for scaling mental health access through teletherapy. Employer-B2B component demonstrates replicability for corporate wellness market. Strong brand in Sweden with potential for geographic expansion.

problem_solved: Many depression patients don't respond to or can't tolerate medication. Flow provides a medically certified tDCS (transcranial direct current stimulation) headset for home-based depression treatment.
who_buys: Healthcare providers (clinics and hospitals), individual consumers (DTC), and potentially insurers
key_features: Medical-grade tDCS headset with companion mobile app
Behavioral therapy app integrated with brain stimulation sessions
Clinical outcomes tracking and progress monitoring
business_model: Device sales (hardware) + optional subscription for enhanced app features
why_varden_care: Novel hardware-software approach to depression treatment with clinical validation. Demonstrates how to commercialize neuromodulation for mental health. Potential for clinic-based deployment model.

problem_solved: Limited access to primary care and mental health services in public healthcare systems. Kry provides a hybrid digital-physical healthcare platform with psychologists, doctors, and physical clinics.
who_buys: Employers (B2B wellness programs), insurers, and individual consumers (DTC); also operates physical clinics
key_features: 24/7 digital access to doctors, psychologists, and other healthcare professionals
Network of 34+ physical clinics across Sweden for in-person care
Employer wellness programs with mental health support
business_model: Hybrid (DTC per-visit pricing + B2B employer contracts + clinic revenue)
why_varden_care: Largest digital health player in Nordics with proven ability to scale. Mental health is a core service line. Employer-B2B component shows replicability for corporate market.

problem_solved: Long wait times for psychological care in public system. Din Psykolog provides rapid access to licensed psychologists through video consultations with transparent pricing.
key_features: Video consultations with licensed psychologists
Fixed pricing per session with transparent costs
Quick booking - appointments within days
why_varden_care: Pure-play teletherapy model focused on psychology. Demonstrates consumer willingness to pay for faster mental health access. Simpler model than full-spectrum platforms.

problem_solved: Fragmented healthcare services and limited digital care options. Mehiläinen provides comprehensive healthcare services including mental health through digital and physical channels.
who_buys: Employers (B2B occupational health), insurers, and individual consumers
key_features: OmaMehiläinen digital health platform with mental health services
Integrated physical and digital care delivery
Comprehensive occupational health programs including mental health support
business_model: Hybrid (B2B employer contracts + DTC services + insurance partnerships)
why_varden_care: Largest private healthcare provider in Finland with strong digital capabilities. Mental health is integrated into comprehensive care model. Proven B2B employer relationships.

problem_solved: Limited access to comprehensive healthcare services. Pihlajalinna provides integrated healthcare including mental health services through digital and physical channels.
who_buys: Employers (B2B occupational health), insurers, and individual consumers
key_features: Pihlajalinna Terveyssovellus health app with digital consultations
Chat-based access to healthcare professionals including mental health
Comprehensive occupational health programs
business_model: Hybrid (B2B employer contracts + DTC services + insurance partnerships)
why_varden_care: Second-largest private healthcare provider in Finland. Strong digital platform with mental health services. Proven B2B model for occupational health.
